name: Kettle River Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 3 Tomatoes, peeled, seeded and coarsely chopped
4 tbsp Finely chopped mixed fresh herbs such as chives, parsley, oregano, Chervil.
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Stir until well mixed.
3. Serve immediately or chill for at least 2 hours before serving with hot crusty bread.
